meta.title: Leaderboard
meta.disclaimer: Ranks aggregate all verified runs in the broadest compatible fixture cohort. Each fixture has equal weight; harness failures are excluded, malformed model answers score zero, and numeric rank requires at least 50% fixture coverage.
meta.note: Primary verified cohort: 38 fixtures, repeat ×1, 66 ranked and 6 unranked cumulative model results.
